item.title: About
item.description: My name is Luke DuCharme. I work as a red team operator at a Fortune 50 company where I hack, code, present, and op with my team to make our organization more secure. I’m currently focusing on: Active Directory and cloud post exploitation Endpoint defenses (EDR/AV) and implant development Sharing research through writing I’m writing this blog to solidify, archive, and share useful information I learn in my career, and I want to build more of a presence in the security community.
